Hardware Info & Monitor Utility for ChromeOS
Simple & Powerful Hardware Information Utility for ChromeOS.

crOS HI&MU allows you to monitor your hardware's current usage statistics & list your hardware's exact information without requiring you to leave your browser.

Source code available on GitHub: https://github.com/gokacinlar/chromeos-hw-resource-app/ 

You can support this project by buying a coffee: buymeacoffee.com/gokacinlar

- Release Notes

-v1.0.6:
-Fix: Options page not working on some devices
-Add: Better top header UI

-v1.0.5:
-New: Options page for better user control over the extension: Users can now select whether app should display hardware monitoring or information or both.
-Fix: Some broken UI elements.
-Add: Some UI enhancements (icons, font weight & size and background changes)

v1.0.4:
-New: Extension now supports displaying Network Information

v1.0.3:
- New: Extension now supports displaying GPU Information
- New: Added tabs to switch between hardware monitoring & information for UI clarity.
 
v1.0.2: 
- New: Extension now supports displaying Monitor (Display) Information
- Fix: Various fixes

v.1.0.1: 
-Initial Stable Release

This solution helps capture and report activity data in ProHance Work Time analytics.

This helps capture and report activity data in ProHance Work Time analytics.
Your toolbox companion to accomplish many handy stuff, without leaving the browser.

Toolguide Companion: Your everyday companion at Work & Daily life. Toolguide encompasses many useful tools varying from Unit Converter to JSON formatter and many many to be added!

Some of the current tools are:

Calculators:
- Basic Calculator
- Color Code Calculator
- Financial Calculator

Converters:
- Base Number Converter
- Unit Converter
- Storage Data Converter
- Speed Measurement Converter
- Time Conversion Calculator
- Currency Information & Calculator

Formatters:
- JSON Formatter
- XML Formatter

Generators:
- Lorem Ipsum Generator
- Password Generator
- Random JSON Generator
- SHA-256 Generator from string
- SHA-512 Generator from string

Utilities:
- URL Parser
- Regex Tester
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder

Ciphers:
- Caesar's Cipher
- ROT-13

Information:
- System Information
- Network Information
- IP Address Information

...with many more to come!

Source code is fully Open-Source and available at GitHub:

https://github.com/gokacinlar/toolguide-companion-browser-extension

NOTE: For feature requests & bug reports, please use GitHub page.
